case_title: MASON, JULIE VS CONNOISSEUR'S GUIDE PUBLISHING INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONNOISSEUR'S GUIDE PUBLISHING INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,661.00 FILED BY MASON, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT CONNOISSEUR'S GUIDE PUBLISHING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASON, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNOISSEUR'S GUIDE PUBLISHING INC. $2,661.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,683.00, DEFENDANT ANTHONY DITTON DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
